\tzpentry{ID5800}{Frame Angular Velocity Relation}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID5800 introduces Frame Angular Velocity Relation as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\begin{equation} \Omega_{\text{frame}} = \frac{2GJ}{c^2 r^3} \left(1 - 3\cos^2\theta\right) \end{equation}
